text:
Everything’s new. Except the attitude.

The all-new Seltos arrives with a bolder expression of power, reimagined in design, elevated in innovation, and built to carry forward the legacy of the badass. It stands dominant with a more assertive exterior, longer wheelbase, stronger, reinforced structure, immersive and roomier cockpit, indulgent comfort features, and advanced ADAS Level 2+ intelligence. Every detail refines the formula while preserving the unmistakable confidence that made it a class-defining badass.

Scan to experience the badass

Striking Star Map LED Connected Tail Lamps Commanding Kia Digital Tiger Face with Dark Gunmetal Accents

Intense Ice Cube LED Projection Headlamps & Star Map LED DRLs Robust Front & Rear Skid Plates with Dark Gunmetal Finish

Iconic R18- 46.20 cm (18”) Sporty Crystal Cut Alloy Wheels with Neon Brake Calipers High-Clarity LED Front Fog Lamps Bolder than ever. And commanding as always.

From the statement-making Digital Tiger Face and 18” Sporty Crystal Cut Alloy Wheels to the impression-leaving tail lamps, every element sharpens the all-new Seltos’ unmistakable road presence. And with Kia’s new design language, it stands bold in stance and iconic in attitude.

Boundless Dual Pane Panoramic Sunroof Exquisite Double D-Cut Dual Tone Leatherette Wrapped Steering Wheel Refined in every detail. And unmistakably badass.

Inside, confidence takes shape in a more spacious cabin crafted to impress. The wide Trinity Panoramic Display commands attention, the Bose Premium Sound System surrounds you in depth, the Ventilated Front Seats keep you at ease, and Ambient Lighting sets the mood. Together, they create a cabin experience where comfort meets unmistakable character.

Adaptive 12.7 cm (5”) Touchscreen Dual Zone Automatic Temperature Control Command-Centric Trinity Panoramic Display Panel Captivating 64 Color Ambient Mood Lighting

Immersive Bose Premium Sound System with 8 Speakers

A new ease within. And indulgence as before.

As you step into the all-new Seltos, a roomier cabin opens up around you, creating a sense of ease. The Driver Seat Welcome Retract Function makes your entry grand, while the 10-Way Power Driver Seat aligns itself to your command, and together they turn comfort into an experience that feels as intuitive as it is indulgent.

Smart Air Purifier with AQI Display Smartphone Wireless Charger Dynamic 10-Way Power Driver Seat with Power Lumbar Adjust Adaptive Integrated Memory System (Driver Seat & ORVMs)

Indulgent Front Ventilated Seats (Driver & Passenger) Maximised Boot Space (447L)**

Torque 253 Nm/ 1 500 ~ 3 500 rpm Torque 144 Nm/ 4 500 rpm Power 117.5 kW/ 5 500 rpm Power

84.4 kW/ 6 300 rpm Power 85 kW/ 4 000 rpm Torque 250 Nm/ 1 500 ~ 2 750 rpm

Impressive Performance

1.5l CRDi VGT Diesel Engine Smartstream G1.5 T-GDi Petrol Engine Smartstream G1.5 Petrol Engine Engineered for refinement. And unstoppable as ever.

The all-new Seltos features refined engine options with a sophisticated suspension designed to strike a balance between comfort and control. Choose from 1.5l NA Petrol, 1.5l Turbo Petrol, or 1.5l Diesel, each paired with smooth, responsive transmissions that deliver precision in the city and command on the highway.

Engaging Paddle Shifters (Available in automatic only) Quick gear shifts for immersive driving experience.

Enhanced in safety. And as confident as always.

With the updated and strengthened K3 Platform, 6 Airbags, Electronic Stability Control, a 360-degree Camera with Blind View Monitor, and more, the all-new Seltos offers protection that lets you take on every road with a quiet, unshaken confidence. It’s the kind of safety that doesn’t just watch over you but backs your every move.

6 Airbags Rear View Camera with Dynamic Guidelines Reactive Side Parking Sensors Head-Up Display - Windshield Projection Smart Dashcam with Front & Rear Camera (With Mobile App) Electronic Stability Control (ESC), Hill Assist Control (HAC) & Vehicle Stability Management (VSM)

Sharper instincts. And the same unshakable assurance.

ADAS Level 2+ equips the all-new Seltos with instincts that never blink, using 28 autonomous features like Front Collision Warning and Avoidance Assist, Lane Keeping Assist and more to sense, react, and protect when it matters most. Every drive feels different when your car anticipates the world and stands beside you like a badass.

Front Collison-Avoidance Assist-Junction Crossing (FCA-JC) Front Collison-Avoidance Assist-Lane Change Oncoming (FCA-LO) Front Collision-Avoidance Assist-Junction Turning (FCA-JT) Lane Keeping Assist (LKA) High Beam Assist (HBA) Smart Cruise Control (SCC) with Stop and Go 50 km/ h 50 km/ h

Mobile App available on:

Smartwatch connectivity on:

Control in your hands. And forever connected.

The all-new Seltos is seamlessly connected with Kia Connect 2.0, offering 85+ connected car features that keep you in control, whether you’re on the move or off the grid. From real-time updates and remote access to essential vehicle information, every drive stays smarter. And with Over-the-Air Software Updates, the all-new Seltos continues to evolve, getting smarter, sharper, and more badass over time.

Intelligent Connectivity Features Advanced Total Care System Valet Mode Over-the-Air (OTA) Software Updates with Kia Remote Diagnostics Remote Seat Ventilation via Kia Connect App Find My Car with Surround View Monitor Digital Key

Smoky Black & Grey Semi-Leatherette/ Fabric Seats with Two-Tone Interiors & Matte Blue Accents Choose your kind of badass.

Features and specifications as shown may not be part of standard fitment and may vary. The interior colours and seat patterns shown belong to the top variants of X-Line, GT-Line, and Tech-Line. Actual interiors and seat patterns may vary in the base variants. The colors shown are subject to availability and may not be available across all variants and may differ slightly from those shown in this brochure. Segment is defined as Mid SUV whose length lies between 4 220 - 4 460 mm and width between 1 760 - 1 830 mm. **VDA Method. ^With R18 Alloy Wheel and Roof Rails. ##Kia Connect 2.0 comes with 3 years free subscription. Kia Connect 2.0 functionality is dependent on mobile network strength. #Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) is not a substitute for human eye and driver vigilance. It is an assistance feature that enhances driving experience and safety. Effectiveness of ADAS may vary based on actual situation and all objects around vehicle may not be detected. The driver shall remain responsible for safe, vigilant, and attentive driving. ~Only available in GT-Line. ºRSA coverage across India except Andaman & Nicobar Islands and Lakshadweep. ^^Selected wear & tear parts coverage with payable Secure Add-on.
